description: Production-grade Speech Processing System featuring Speech-to-Text (Whisper+BiLSTM+CTC) and Text-to-Speech (Neural+System TTS) with web interface. M1-optimized PyTorch implementation, 95% ASR accuracy, hybrid fallback architecture. Includes browser recording, real-time inference, comprehensive documentation.

notes: 相关技术: system, mlx, tts

description: Train and deploy AI models across multiple Apple Silicon devices with automatic hardware optimization and a seamless developer experience. A user-friendly CLI framework for distributed training, powered by MLX.
Local AI is a wrapper around Apple silicon mlx-lm library to facilitate local deployment of optimized models for Apple Silicon

mlx-ml is the open-source repo I created to simplify MLX-LM workflows for LoRA fine-tuning, inference, and deployment of language models on Apple Silicon. Use a single config.yaml to define models, datasets, LoRA params (rank, scale, dropout), optimizers, and more — then run terminal commands for training, text generation, interactive chats, or ...

Your complete guide to running powerful AI models locally in 2025. Covers open-source LLMs, hardware requirements, deployment strategies, and optimization techniques for private, offline AI assistance. Learn more at https://secretai.io

The smallest hardware device for efficient large for efficient language models (LLMs) inference optimized for low-power, low-cost embedded SoCs, supporting on-device real-time Whisper speech-to-text and LLM chatbot in the same time.

An open-source, PyQt6-based AI dictation assistant. Leverages faster-whisper for real-time, local inference on NVIDIA GPUs. Includes hardware-level optimizations to prevent Bluetooth headset degradation, background system tray execution, and graceful VRAM cleanup.

WhisperRT-CPU is a CPU-optimized implementation of OpenAI’s Whisper model designed for near real-time speech recognition. The project focuses on accelerating inference on CPU and provides a comprehensive comparison against baseline GPU and CPU implementations in terms of latency, memory, energy efficiency, and transcription accuracy (WER/CER).

Fine-tuned OpenAI Whisper on an English–Hindi dataset with advanced audio preprocessing and augmentation, achieving a 22% WER reduction and enabling fast real-time inference with fp16 optimization and caching.

Production-grade Speech Processing System featuring Speech-to-Text (Whisper+BiLSTM+CTC) and Text-to-Speech (Neural+System TTS) with web interface. M1-optimized PyTorch implementation, 95% ASR accuracy, hybrid fallback architecture. Includes browser recording, real-time inference, comprehensive documentation.
